What's new

  • Major engine overhaul — indexing and search are significantly faster and now scale to millions of files.
  • Real-time progress information during indexing.
  • Unified setup for space creation with command previews organized under the menu.
  • Completely reworked file preview with syntax highlighting and formatting for text-based files.
  • Preview support for PDFs, Word, Excel, and other document types.
  • New themes and color schemes to match your preferred look.

Thank you for the continued support and feedback!
